task_params.title: Art-Therapy Pilot Memo
memo_points: link pilot to patient experience goals like anxiety reduction and engagement
keep tone practical and evidence-aware, not aspirational
note small-scale pilot scope with measurable outcomes
mention staff workflow impact and implementation guardrails
include budget-conscious framing and partnership option

attributes.title: Q2 Patient Experience Baseline
attributes.content_brief: Baseline scores for wait communication, anxiety, satisfaction, and discharge clarity across ambulatory units.

attributes.title: Volunteer Arts Rounds Summary
attributes.content_brief: Short summary of informal bedside arts activities, patient comments, and staff observations from a small volunteer initiative.

attributes.title: Clinic Throughput Improvement Review
attributes.content_brief: Lean review of cycle times, rooming delays, and staffing adjustments in outpatient clinics.
